name: Peperoni Al Vaso (Marinated Peppers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, core and seed the green peppers. Cut into long thin strips.
2. In a deep casserole, combine both vinegars, sugar, salt, and halved garlic cloves. Bring to a strong boil.
3. Add the green pepper strips and cook for 10 minutes. Remove from liquid and place on paper towels to dry.
4. Layer green peppers in a glass jar with chopped garlic, capers, anchovy pieces, and basil leaves. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used.
5. Top with additional basil.
6. Pour olive oil into the jar, pressing down on contents to coat everything thoroughly. Ensure at least 1/2-inch of oil covers the top and eliminate any air pockets.
7. Seal the jar hermetically and store in a cool, dark place for at least 20 days.
